name: io.github.ankitsxchdeva/account-pool-mcp
title: Account Pool
description: Brokers exclusive, crash-safe leases on a pool of test accounts so parallel Claude/agent QA sessions never grab the same account.

environmentVariables.name: APM_ACCOUNTS_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to the JSON file defining pools + accounts to load on startup.

environmentVariables.name: APM_DB_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the SQLite file. Every session that should coordinate must point at the SAME path.

environmentVariables.name: APM_DEFAULT_TTL_SECONDS
environmentVariables.description: How long a lease lasts before it is reclaimable if a session crashes without releasing.

environmentVariables.name: APM_LEASE_WAIT_MS
environmentVariables.description: 0 = fail fast when the pool is empty; >0 = wait this many ms for an account to free up.
